quoteDefault: "Opportunity is not something that happens, it is something you create."
introDesc: OnTo is a personal dashboard that brings together clock, weather, calendar, memos, quick shortcuts, and AI chatbots. Start managing your daily life smarter.
alertDel: Are you sure you want to delete?
tutSidebarDesc: Hover over the right edge to reveal the widget panel. Manage Weather, Quote, Search, Shortcuts, and more in your preferred order.
tutWeatherDesc:
Shows current weather and forecast.
Requires location permission for accurate info.
tutMainDesc: Access various search engines and manage your favorite sites.
tutBottomWidgetsDesc: Notifications, Calendar (with navigation), and Clock (click to toggle 12/24h) are stacked from the bottom.
tutSettingDesc: Manage themes, backgrounds, alerts, memos, and shortcuts.
tutFileDesc: Securely backup or restore all your data.
msgInputNameUrl: Please enter both name and URL.
msgAiOpenAiError: Response does not match OpenAI spec.
msgAiOllamaError: Response does not match Ollama spec.
msgAiLocalError: Local addresses must use OpenAI or Ollama protocol.
msgAiPathError: API path not found or protocol mismatch.
msgAiConnError: Cannot connect. Check URL, port, and CORS.
msgAttachFuture: File attachment will be supported in the future.
msgAiModelSelectTip1:
Install models on server
to use other models.
msgAiModelSelectTip2:
Model list will appear
when connected to server.
tutMemoContent: This is a temporary memo for the tutorial.
tutFileManageDesc: First, data management. You can backup and restore your widgets, themes, and data.
tutSearchDesc: Search instantly using various engines. You can also add custom ones.
tutAIDesc: Connect OpenAI, Gemini, or Local AI to chat. Solve your questions instantly.
tutPanelDesc: Hover over the right edge arrow to reveal the panel. Toggle widgets here.
tutCalDesc:
Check schedules and navigate months easily.
Click a date to quickly add a recurring alert.
tutClockDesc: View time and date at a glance. Click to toggle 12/24 hour format.
tutMenuDesc: Click the settings widget to reveal more options. Let's explore them from the right.
tutAddShortcutDesc: Add your frequently visited websites as shortcuts.
tutShortcutAreaDesc: Added shortcuts appear in the center. Rearrange them with drag and drop.
tutAddMemoDesc: Click the memo icon to jot down quick notes.
tutDesktopMemoDesc: Memos are saved on the left desktop. You can check them anytime like this one.
tutAddAlertDesc: Add alerts or timers for any specific time.
tutAlertAreaDesc: Manage your active alerts directly on the desktop.
tutSettingIconDesc: Finally, this icon opens the detailed settings window.
tutConfigDesc: From theme colors to widget sizes and backgrounds! Build your own dashboard freely.
introPrivacy: Your personal information is not sent to any server.
msgSelectDay: Please select a day to repeat.
msgSelectWeek: Please select a week to repeat.
msgSelectMonth: Please select a month to repeat.
msgSelectYear: Please select a year to repeat.
resetConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to reset?
resetConfirmDesc: (All settings and data will be permanently deleted.)
